title: Deploy, manage, and monitor Windows containers on Azure Kubernetes Service
summary: Learn how to deploy, manage, monitor, and operate Windows containers on Azure Kubernetes Service and AKS Hybrid by examining the core principles of Windows containers and Kubernetes.

sections.title: Deploy, manage, and monitor Windows containers on Azure Kubernetes Service
sections.summary: Learn how to deploy, manage, monitor, and operate Windows containers on Azure Kubernetes Service and AKS Hybrid by examining the core principles of Windows containers and Kubernetes.

Introduction to Docker containers

lessons.title: Build a containerized web application with Docker
lessons.content_md:
Use Docker to build, store, and manage private container images with the Azure Container Registry.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-containers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build a containerized web application with Docker

lessons.title: Introduction to Kubernetes
lessons.content_md:
Get acquainted with the Kubernetes open-source container-orchestration system for automating application deployment, scaling, and management.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-kubernetes/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-kubernetes-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Deploy a containerized application on Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:
Explore how to create and deploy a containerized application by using Azure Kubernetes Service declarative manifest files.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/aks-deploy-container-app/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy a containerized application on Azure Kubernetes Service

lessons.title: Apply storage concepts to Windows containers running on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) and AKS Hybrid
lessons.content_md:

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deploy, manage, and monitor Windows containers on Azure Kubernetes Service
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deploy, manage, and monitor Windows containers on Azure Kubernetes Service**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
